nasb.text: ‘For I will defend this city to save it for My own sake and for My servant David’s sake.’ ”

esv.text: For I will defend this city to save it, for my own sake and for the sake of my servant David.”

cnv.text: 因我為自己的緣故，又為我僕人大衛的緣故，必保護這城，拯救這城。’”

ccb.text: 我必为自己和我仆人大卫而保护、拯救这城。’”

csbs.text: 要知道，我必为自己的缘故和我仆人大卫的缘故， 保护拯救这城。’”
